title: hieracium caesium subsp. laeticeps
intro: Hieracium caesium subsp. laeticeps, also known as the spotted hawkweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is a medicinal plant used in traditional herbal medicine, with properties that include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Hieracium caesium subsp. laeticeps include its potential to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate digestive problems. Hieracium caesium subsp. laeticeps is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be used topically as a salve or ointment to apply directly to affected areas.
